title: Refined Patchwork
description: Tweak lot of craft in minecraft and add some of new (more decraftable items, wood in stone cutter...) [MC 1.21.X]
body:
# Refined Patchwork ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c489b72ac1ddae75d17760db6c795392026166b0.png) This datapack adds and tweaks many vanilla recipes and behaviors. It aims to enhance the Minecraft experience without breaking the game's balance. --- ## 🛠️ Features
Edited Vanilla Crafts ### ▶️Grindstone can be crafted with stone, sandstone, or red sandstone slabs.

### ▶️Carrot on a Stick and Warped Fungus on a Stick are shapeless.

### ▶️Stonecutter can be crafted with stone, deepslate, granite, diorite, or andesite.

### ▶️All Redstone items that use cobblestone in their crafting recipe can also be crafted with cobblestone, cobbled deepslate, or blackstone *(e.g., Piston, Observer...)*.

### ▶️All Redstone items that use stone in their crafting recipe can also be crafted with stone, deepslate, granite, diorite, or andesite *(e.g., Comparator, Repeater...)*.

### ▶️Daylight Detector can now be crafted with any type of glass (except tinted glass).

### ▶️Crafting wood from logs gives **4** wood *(instead of 3 in vanilla)*, and this works with any wood variant.

### ▶️Crafting a quartz block gives **4** quartz blocks.

### ▶️Crafting a trapdoor gives 6 trapdoors *(exept for bamboo)*.

### ▶️Blast Furnaces can be crafted with smooth stone, smooth sandstone, or smooth red sandstone.

### ▶️Leads no longer require slimeballs *(like newer Minecraft versions)*.

New Crafting Recipes ### ▶️Podzol can be crafted using dirt and any type of leaves.

### ▶️1 wool gives 4 string

### ▶️Melon blocks gives 9 slices.

### ▶️All utility tables *(cartography, smithing, fletching, loom)* can be crafted using a crafting table + specific item.

### ▶️Anvils can be crafted with iron blocks and chipped anvils *(chipped anvils can be crafted the same way, but using damaged anvils)*.

- Leaves can be converted into any other type using a sapling. - You can craft and convert torches and soul torches. - Craft light blocks with levels 1, 7, 10, and 15. - Craft invisible and glowing item frames. - Add many new ways to obtain dyes. - `[1.21.10+]` You can craft a Copper Torch by combining a regular Torch with one Copper Nugget. - `[1.21.10+]` You can craft a Copper Lantern by combining a regular Lantern with one Copper Nugget.
New Uncrafting Recipes - Honeycomb blocks can be uncrafted into 4 honeycombs. - You can uncraft a chest boat to retrieve both the boat and the chest. - You can uncraft a minecart chest to retrieve both the minecart and the chest. - You can uncraft a minecart furnace to retrieve both the minecart and the furnace. - You can uncraft a minecart hopper to retrieve both the minecart and the hopper. - You can uncraft a minecart TNT to retrieve both the minecart and the TNT.
Duplication - You can duplicate cobbled deepslate by combining 1 cobblestone with 1 deepslate. - Banner patterns can be duplicated using paper - Sherds can be duplicated using 4 bricks
Stonecutter - All wood types, including bamboo, can be used in the stonecutter. - Deepslate provides all deepslate variants in the stonecutter. - Light blocks can be converted to any light level - Paintings can be placed in a stonecutter to select the desired variant. - You can choose different armor stand variants by placing them in the stonecutter.
Smithing Table ###

🔴`[1.21.11+]`

▶️Lets you upgrade Nautilus Armor using Nautilus Shells, the current armor piece, and the materials of the next tier. **You must upgrade step by step** — for example, you can’t go directly from iron to diamond; you have to go through the golden tier first.

Furnace - Smelting copper, iron, or gold raw blocks gives copper, iron, or gold blocks. - Ancient debris cannot be smelted in a standard furnace but only in a blast furnace *(with a longer cooking time)*.
Miscellaneous - Eating a melon slice gives one melon seed. - `[1.21+]` Trial spawners will give more food when they drop it. - Frogspawn can be obtain with silktouch - Many new ways to obtain dyes - Combine colored wool to create new colors *(not all combinations are supported)*. For example, `red + white = pink`. - Throwing wet sponge into the Nether dries it - Holding a clock shows the time **(customizable format**). Use `/trigger rfpw.clock.toggle.display` to toggle the display, and `/trigger rfpw.clock.toggle.format` to change the time format. - Holding a compass shows your coordinates. Use `/trigger rfpw.compass.toggle.display` to toggle the display. - Holding a recovery compass shows your death location. Use `/trigger rfpw.recovery_compass.toggle.display` to toggle the display. - `[1.21+]` Having a Heavy Core in your inventory gives Slowness II - Normal potions and banner patterns stack up to 16 - Splashing a water potion on lava transforms it into cobblestone. - `[1.21.2+]` Throw a plant named `Placeable` to place it on any full block - Wet sponge can also dry on a campfire - Climbing speed on climbable blocks *(ladders, vines, weeping vines, twisting vines, and scaffolding)* is enhanced by sneaking, jumping, and looking *(up = climb, down = descend)*. For versions `1.21` and `1.21.1`, the effect is the same but jumping is not required - Falling into the End void while holding a totem teleports you back - `[1.21.6+]` Change the H.Ghast base ‘flying_speed’ attribute from 0.05 to 0.085 when it is being ridden and the player is holding a snowball in both the main and off-hand - `[1.21.10+]` The more a Copper Golem is oxidized, the slower it moves.
Entity Interactions - Taking llama spit damage while holding a piston in your main or off-hand transforms it into a sticky piston. - Hitting a squid while holding white wool turns the wool into black wool, and hitting a glow squid turns it into cyan wool. - Hitting a squid or glow squid causes 2 seconds of blindness.
Cauldron Interactions - Dropping magma cream into a water-filled cauldron produces a slimeball. - Dropping concrete powder into a water-filled cauldron turns it into concrete. - Dropping dirt into a water-filled cauldron turns it into mud. - Dropping any colored wool into a water-filled cauldron turns it white. - Dropping any colored carpet into a water-filled cauldron turns it white. - Dropping any colored bed into a water-filled cauldron turns it white. - Dropping any colored banner into a water-filled cauldron turns it white. - Dropping any colored glass or glass pane into a water-filled cauldron removes its color.
--- ## ✅ Compatibility - Minecraft 1.21.X ✅ --- [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support%20me%20on%20Ko--Fi-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white&logoSize=auto&labelColor=FF716D&color=FF716D)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T117BAZT)
